Tests that `Math.exp(NaN)` returns `NaN` using an assertion.

# Purpose
This code is a simple test script that verifies the behavior of the `Math.exp` function when given `NaN` as an input. It uses the `assert` function to check that the result of `Math.exp(NaN)` is `NaN`, which is the expected behavior according to the ECMAScript specification. This script provides narrow functionality, focusing solely on this specific mathematical operation and its compliance with expected standards.
